mapper.sql: select article_id, manuscript_id, issue_id, column_id, journal_code, file_no, title, title_en, subtitle, author_names, author_names_en, author_org_zh, author_org_en, doi, abstract, abstract_en, keywords, keywords_en, fund_zh, fund_en, content, reference_text, citation_text, page_start, page_end, word_count, submit_time, last_modify_time, volume, period, year_no, status, publish_time, view_count, download_count, html_view_count, cited_count, self_cited_count, other_cited_count, cnki_cited_count, cnki_title, cnki_match_status, article_url, pdf_path, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from publisher_article
mapper.insert: insert into publisher_article ( manuscript_id, issue_id, column_id, journal_code, file_no, title, title_en, subtitle, author_names, author_names_en, author_org_zh, author_org_en, doi, abstract, abstract_en, keywords, keywords_en, fund_zh, fund_en, content, reference_text, citation_text, page_start, page_end, word_count, submit_time, last_modify_time, volume, period, year_no, status, publish_time, view_count, download_count, html_view_count, cited_count, self_cited_count, other_cited_count, cnki_cited_count, cnki_title, cnki_match_status, article_url, pdf_path, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark ) values ( #{manuscriptId}, #{issueId}, #{columnId}, #{journalCode}, #{fileNo}, #{title}, #{titleEn}, #{subtitle}, #{authorNames}, #{authorNamesEn}, #{authorOrgZh}, #{authorOrgEn}, #{doi}, #{abstractText}, #{abstractEn}, #{keywords}, #{keywordsEn}, #{fundZh}, #{fundEn}, #{content}, #{referenceText}, #{citationText}, #{pageStart}, #{pageEnd}, #{wordCount}, #{submitTime}, #{lastModifyTime}, #{volume}, #{period}, #{yearNo}, #{status}, #{publishTime}, #{viewCount}, #{downloadCount}, #{htmlViewCount}, #{citedCount}, #{selfCitedCount}, #{otherCitedCount}, #{cnkiCitedCount}, #{cnkiTitle}, #{cnkiMatchStatus}, #{articleUrl}, #{pdfPath}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{updateBy}, sysdate(), #{remark} )
mapper.update: update publisher_article set status = #{status}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where article_id = #{articleId}

update publisher_article set cited_count = ifnull(cnki_cited_count, 0), update_time = sysdate() where article_id in
#{articleId}
mapper.delete:
delete from publisher_article where article_id in
#{articleId}
